changelog: Fixed: Theme persistence and reflow issue — theme now persists on reload and applies instantly with reflow mechanism
Fixed: ColorPicker swatch/hex input row alignment — wrapped in flex items-center gap-4 with input flex-1
Added: Light/Dark/System theme architecture — themeMode state in store with localStorage persistence, useThemeSwitcher hook, and ThemeToggle component
Fixed: ColorPicker Apply button not closing window — added robust error handling with try/catch blocks and fallbacks to ensure modal always closes
Fixed: Light mode not switching to white background — corrected theme controller to set --bg-primary, --bg-secondary, --text-primary variables used by index.css
